task_completion.description: The required certificate text is entered into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Certificate of Completion', 'James A. Smith', and 'Industrial Workplace Safety Level II' is visible in the Word document canvas.

task_completion.description: The document orientation is set to Landscape.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page canvas is wider than it is tall, or the 'Landscape' option is visibly selected in the Layout -> Orientation menu or Page Setup dialog.

task_completion.description: The text is vertically centered on the page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text appears in the vertical middle of the page with roughly equal white space above and below it, or the Page Setup dialog (Layout tab) shows Vertical alignment set to 'Center'.

task_completion.description: A double line, 3pt page border is applied.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A border consisting of two parallel lines is visible around the page edges and appears thick (3pt), or the Borders and Shading dialog shows the 'Double' line style and '3 pt' width selected for the Page Border.

task_completion.description: The page border color is set to Dark Blue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The applied page border is visibly dark blue, or the Borders and Shading dialog shows a dark blue color selected in the Color dropdown.

task_completion.description: The document is saved to the correct path with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word title bar displays 'Safety_Certificate.docx', or a Save As dialog shows the file being saved as 'Safety_Certificate.docx' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Word GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Word ribbon, dialog boxes, and document canvas, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent used actual Word formatting features rather than manual workarounds.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used Page Setup for centering and Page Borders for the border, rather than pressing 'Enter' repeatedly to center text or inserting rectangular shapes to fake a border.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Save or Save As dialog is used to navigate to the Documents folder and name the file, rather than using a script to move or rename an existing file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be saved as 'Safety_Certificate.docx' in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\'. It must contain the text 'Certificate of Completion', 'James A. Smith', and 'Industrial Workplace Safety'. The page orientation must be Landscape. The text must be vertically centered on the page using Page Setup settings (not just horizontally). The document must have a page border that is Dark Blue, Double Line style, and 3pt width.
